About Portfolio Research Connect

I am a dedicated Software Engineer currently driving innovation at UnitedHealth Group. With over five years of experience in building robust digital solutions, I specialize in bridging the gap between complex technical architectures and intuitive user experiences. My technical toolkit is centered on Java, TypeScript, and Python, complemented by modern front-end frameworks like React and Tailwind CSS. I have a proven track record of leveraging cloud infrastructure and advanced data processing tools, including AWS EC2, Kafka, and OpenSearch, to develop scalable, high-performance applications.

I enjoy working with new technologies, collaborating with others, and problem-solving. I welcome feedback, new ideas, and different perspectives. Feel free to connect with me and we can look to create something amazing together!

Certificates & Workshops

Google AI Workshop Dec 2025
Generative AI Certificate Nov 2025
Full Stack Java Developer Certificate Jul 2022
Full Stack Software Engineer Bootcamp Aug 2021

Skills

Languages Java, TypeScript, Python
Web Technologies React, Tailwind CSS, GitHub Pages
Tools & Services AWS Bedrock, Kafka, OpenSearch, Docker
Methodology Agile, TDD, Technical Philosophy, Technical Writing

View Full Resume (PDF) →

Outside of coding, I am a student of Philosophy at Minneapolis College, a discipline that informs my ethical approach to technology and problem-solving. I love learning new things, whether it's a new programming language, a new philosophy concept, or a new skill. I am a lifelong learner and I am always looking for new challenges.

In my free time, some hobbies I enjoy are: Cooking, working out, reading, and trying new activities! Some recent exciting things I've done are: growing my own mushrooms, and hosting a weekly philosophy discussion group. I also have a personal project, Thinking Lately, where I post my personal thoughts on philosophy and literature.
